title: Loader gives way to the portfolio content
description: A visitor can wait for the splash screen to finish and then see the portfolio content appear.

steps.description: Wait for the loader animation to complete
Verify the portfolio content is visible

title: Load the portfolio and view the hero section
description: This verifies that a visitor can land on the portfolio, wait for the initial reveal, and see the hero content that introduces Mohamed Aathil.

steps.description: Wait for the initial page reveal to complete
Verify the hero introduction is displayed
Verify the primary call to action links are visible

title: Send a message from the contact form
description: This verifies that a visitor can complete the contact form and receive feedback after submission.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Mohamed Aathil
Fill in the email field with mohamed@example.com
Fill in the subject field with Portfolio inquiry
Fill in the message field with Hello, I would like to get in touch about an opportunity.
Verify a submission feedback toast is visible
Verify the contact form remains visible

title: Navbar links move to the main sections
description: A visitor can use the sticky navbar to jump to key sections and see the active section state update.

steps.description: Click the navbar link for the About section
Click the navbar link for the Projects section
Verify the page has scrolled to the Projects section
Verify the corresponding navbar item is marked as active

title: Use the hero CTA to jump to projects
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the hero navigation to jump directly from the landing section to the projects section.

steps.description: Click the primary action that shows the work section
Verify the projects section is displayed

title: Use the hero CTA to jump to contact
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the hero section to the contact section using the main contact call to action.

steps.description: Click the primary action that shows the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed
Verify the contact form is visible

title: Navbar logo returns to the hero section
description: A visitor can click the navbar logo and return to the top hero section.

steps.description: Verify the hero section is visible

title: Reach the projects section from the sticky navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the sticky navigation to jump to the projects section while browsing the page.

steps.description: Click the navigation link for the projects section
Verify the projects section is displayed
Verify the projects content is visible

title: Reach the contact section from the sticky navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the sticky navigation to jump to the contact section while browsing the page.

steps.description: Click the navigation link for the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed
Verify the contact form is visible

title: Contact form shows an error state on submit
description: A visitor can complete the contact form and see an error toast when submission does not complete successfully in the current app state.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Mohamed Aathil
Fill in the email field with test@example.com
Fill in the message field with a short inquiry
Verify an error toast is visible

title: Theme changes across the portfolio
description: A visitor can switch the site theme and see the portfolio update to the alternate appearance.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the navbar
Verify the page appearance changes to the alternate theme

title: Projects can be filtered and opened externally
description: A visitor can filter projects, inspect a project card, and open its external source link.

steps.description: Click a project card action that opens the source repository
Verify the external project link opens

title: View all projects from the full list
description: A visitor can open the projects section and switch to the full list so all projects are shown.

steps.description: Click the filter for all projects
Verify the project grid is visible

title: Theme choice can be switched back
description: A visitor can toggle the theme twice and return the site to its original appearance.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the navbar
Click the theme toggle button in the navbar again
Verify the page appearance returns to the original theme

title: Open social profile links from the hero
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the public social profile links from the hero section and reach the intended external destinations.

steps.description: Verify the external profile pages open in new tabs
Verify the hero social links remain available

title: Block contact submission when a required field is missing
description: This verifies that the contact form prevents submission when a required field is left empty.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with Mohamed Aathil
Fill in the email field with mohamed@example.com
Fill in the subject field with Portfolio inquiry
Verify a required field validation error is visible
Verify the form is not submitted

title: Open a project repository
description: A visitor can use a project card to open the repository in a new tab through the external GitHub link.

steps.description: Click the GitHub link on a project card
Verify the project repository opens in a new tab

title: Contact form validates required fields
description: A visitor sees validation feedback when trying to submit the contact form without completing the required inputs.

steps.description: Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation messages are visible

title: Filter projects by category
description: A visitor can filter the projects grid to see only projects from a selected category.

steps.description: Verify only projects from the selected category are displayed
Verify the filtered project grid is visible

title: Download the resume from the hero section
description: This verifies that a visitor can start the resume download from the landing section.

steps.description: Verify a resume download is initiated
Verify the resume access control remains available in the hero section

title: About and skills content can be explored
description: A visitor can scroll through the profile area and switch skill categories to review the displayed skills content.

steps.description: Verify the selected skill category content is displayed

title: Open GitHub side link
description: This verifies that the GitHub side link opens the profile in a new tab when clicked.

steps.description: Verify the GitHub profile opens in a new tab

title: Open a live project from the card
description: A visitor can launch an available live project from its card and reach the external site in a new tab.

steps.description: Click the View Live link on a project with a live URL
Verify the live project opens in a new tab

title: Open LinkedIn side link
description: This verifies that the LinkedIn side link opens the profile in a new tab when clicked.

steps.description: Verify the LinkedIn profile opens in a new tab

title: Resume and external profile links are accessible
description: A visitor can use the hero links to open the resume or a social profile from the portfolio.

steps.description: Click the resume link in the hero section
Click one of the hero social links
Verify an external destination is opened for the selected link

title: Filter skills by category
description: This verifies that a visitor can switch skill categories and see the displayed skills update to match the selected discipline.

steps.description: Verify the displayed skills update for the selected category
Verify the category selection remains active

title: Open email side link
description: This verifies that the email side link opens the user’s mail client when clicked.

title: Inspect a project card
description: A visitor can open the projects section and review a project card’s title, description, and technology badges.

steps.description: Verify the project details are visible
Verify the technology badges are visible

title: View the about section profile summary and stats
description: This verifies that a visitor can scroll to the about section and review Mohamed Aathil’s profile summary and achievement counters.

steps.description: Verify the profile bio content is displayed
Verify the achievement counters are displayed

title: Mobile menu opens and closes while navigating
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, choose a section, and reach the target section from the drawer.

steps.description: Click the navbar link for the Contact section
Verify the navigation drawer is closed
Verify the Contact section is visible

title: Browse the experience timeline
description: A visitor can scroll to the experience section and review the role, company, duration, description, and technologies used.

steps.description: Verify the experience timeline is displayed
Verify the role and tech stack details are visible

title: View certifications as the section scrolls into view
description: This verifies that scrolling to the certifications area reveals the certification cards with their details.

steps.description: Verify each certification card shows its issuer and date

title: Scroll progress reflects page position
description: This verifies that the page’s scroll progress indicator updates as the visitor moves through the portfolio.

steps.description: Verify the scroll progress indicator is visible
Verify the scroll progress indicator reflects page position

title: Switch between multiple skill categories
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse more than one skill category and see each selection change the visible skill set.

steps.description: Click a different skill category tab
Verify the visible skills change to match the second category
Verify only one category is selected at a time

title: Review the education timeline
description: A visitor can scroll to the education section and view the degree, institution, period, grade, and coursework details.

steps.description: Verify the education timeline is displayed
Verify the degree and academic details are visible

title: View footer and return to top
description: This verifies that the footer appears at the bottom of the portfolio and the back-to-top control returns the page to the top.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Click the back to top control
Verify the page scrolls to the top

title: View the resume preview
description: This verifies that the resume section renders the embedded preview when a visitor scrolls to it.

steps.description: Verify the resume preview is displayed

title: Open social profile links from the contact section
description: This verifies that the social icons in the contact section open the expected external profiles in a new tab.

steps.description: Verify each social profile opens in a new tab
Verify the contact section remains visible

title: Download the resume from the portfolio
description: This verifies that a visitor can trigger the resume download from the resume section.

steps.description: Verify the resume download is initiated

title: Open the email contact channel
description: This verifies that the contact section provides a working email link for direct outreach.

steps.description: Verify the mail client is opened
Verify the contact section remains visible

title: Project live links are disabled when unavailable
description: A visitor can see that a project without a live site does not offer an enabled live-view action.

steps.description: Verify at least one project card shows a disabled live-view action

title: Open a certification verification link
description: This verifies that a certification card can launch its verification link in a new tab.

steps.description: Verify the verification link opens in a new tab
Verify the certification card remains visible on the page
